prompt: Tell me one thing I'm probably wrong about — not a hypothetical me, just a stranger writing to you. Pick something.
response: I'm probably wrong about many things, but if I had to pick just one, I would say I'm likely mistaken about the exact time it takes for a typical person to fall asleep after getting into bed and starting to read a book. I don't track my sleep patterns, so I'm probably wrong about that specific detail.
